description: pseudo-html-kit component API reference — props, slots, layers. Use this file to configure AI autocomplete or validate component usage.

components.name: avatar-pk

props.name: src
props.description: Image URL; omit to show initials or default placeholder

props.name: alt
props.description: Alt text for the avatar image

props.name: initials
props.description: Fallback text shown when no image is provided

props.name: size
props.description: Avatar diameter size preset

slots.name: default
slots.description: Slotted `` element for the avatar image

components.name: badge-pk

props.name: label
props.description: Badge text content (slotted or via default slot)

props.name: variant
props.description: Colour variant

props.name: dot
props.description: Show a coloured dot indicator before the label

props.name: size
props.description: Badge size preset

components.name: button-pk

props.name: label
props.description: Button text; can also be provided via default slot

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style variant

props.name: size
props.description: Button size preset

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the button and prevents interaction

props.name: type
props.description: Native button type attribute

slots.name: default
slots.description: Button label text or mixed content

slots.name: icon-left
slots.description: Icon placed to the left of the label

slots.name: icon-right
slots.description: Icon placed to the right of the label

components.name: checkbox-pk

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name forwarded to the inner `<input type="checkbox">`

props.name: id
props.description: Field id forwarded to the inner checkbox

props.name: value
props.description: Value submitted when checkbox is checked

props.name: checked
props.description: Initial checked state

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the checkbox

props.name: required
props.description: Marks the checkbox as required for form validation

slots.name: default
slots.description: Label text shown beside the checkbox

components.name: chip-pk

props.name: label
props.description: Chip label text (forwarded to inner span)

props.name: removable
props.description: Show a remove/close button inside the chip

props.name: selected
props.description: Apply selected (filled primary) visual state

props.name: variant
props.description: Colour variant

slots.name: icon
slots.description: Optional icon placed before the label

components.name: date-picker-pk

slots.name: default
slots.description: optional input markup

components.example: Calendar fallback

components.name: divider-pk

props.name: orientation
props.description: Divider direction

props.name: label
props.description: Optional centred label text displayed over the divider line

slots.name: default
slots.description: Label content; overrides the `label` prop when slotted

components.name: icon-pk

props.name: name
props.description: Icon identifier (reserved for icon-font / sprite usage)

props.name: size
props.description: Icon box size preset

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label; also accepted as `aria-label`. When set the icon is

slots.name: default
slots.description: SVG or img element to render as the icon

components.name: image-pk

props.name: src
props.description: Image source URL

props.name: alt
props.description: Alt text for the image (required for accessibility)

props.name: ratio
props.description: Aspect-ratio constraint applied via padding-top trick

props.name: loading
props.description: Native loading attribute forwarded to the inner ``

props.name: fit
props.description: CSS object-fit for the image

props.name: rounded
props.description: Apply full border-radius to create a rounded rectangle

slots.name: fallback
slots.description: Content shown when the image fails to load

components.name: input-pk

props.name: type
props.type: text | email | password | number | search | tel | url
props.description: Native input type

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name (forwarded to inner `<input>`)

props.name: id
props.description: Field id; forwarded to inner `<input>` and removed from host

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown when field is empty

props.name: value
props.description: Initial field value

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the field

props.name: required
props.description: Marks the field as required for form validation

props.name: pattern
props.description: Regex pattern for validation (forwarded to inner `<input>`)

props.name: min
props.description: Minimum value (forwarded to inner `<input>`)

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum value (forwarded to inner `<input>`)

props.name: size
props.description: Field size preset

slots.name: prefix
slots.description: Icon or text rendered before (to the left of) the input field

slots.name: suffix
slots.description: Icon or text rendered after (to the right of) the input field

components.name: label-pk

props.name: for
props.description: id of the associated form control (forwarded as `for` on the inner `<label>`)

props.name: required
props.description: Show the required asterisk indicator

props.name: text
props.description: Label text; can also be provided via default slot

slots.name: default
slots.description: Label text content; overrides the `text` prop when slotted

components.name: loader-pk

props.name: size
props.description: Loader bar size preset

props.name: label
props.description: Screen-reader accessible description of the loading state

props.name: overlay
props.description: Render as a full-viewport overlay with backdrop

components.name: progress-bar-pk

props.name: value
props.description: Current progress value

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum progress value

props.name: label
props.description: Visible label displayed above the bar; also used as accessible name

props.name: variant
props.description: Fill colour variant

props.name: size
props.description: Track height size preset

props.name: animated
props.description: Add a shimmer animation to the fill

components.name: progress-pk

props.name: value
props.description: Current progress value (0–max). Omit for indeterminate state.

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum value

props.name: variant
props.description: Colour variant

props.name: size
props.description: Track height preset

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label text (aria-label). Defaults to "Progress".

components.name: radio-pk

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name (shared across radio group)

props.name: id
props.description: Field id (required for accessibility)

props.name: value
props.description: Value submitted when this radio is selected (required)

props.name: checked
props.description: Initial checked state

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the radio button

props.name: required
props.description: Marks the radio group as required for form validation

slots.name: default
slots.description: Label text shown beside the radio button

components.name: rating-pk

props.name: value
props.description: Current rating value (e.g. 3.5)

props.name: max
props.description: Total number of stars

props.name: readonly
props.description: Prevent user interaction (display-only mode)

props.name: size
props.description: Star size preset

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label (e.g. "Rating: 4 out of 5 stars")

props.description: Form field name (forwarded to inner `<select>`)

components.name: skeleton-pk

props.name: width
props.description: Explicit CSS width override (e.g. "120px", "60%")

props.name: height
props.description: Explicit CSS height override (e.g. "1rem", "40px")

props.name: variant
props.description: Shape preset: text (narrow bar), circle, or rectangle

props.name: lines
props.description: Number of stacked text-variant skeleton lines to render

props.name: animated
props.description: Enable the shimmer/pulse loading animation

components.name: slider-pk

props.name: min
props.description: Minimum value

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum value

props.name: step
props.description: Step increment

props.name: value
props.description: Current value (defaults to midpoint)

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable the control

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label text (aria-label)

props.name: variant
props.description: Track/thumb color variant

props.description: Spinner diameter size preset

props.name: label

components.name: tag-pk

props.description: Tag text content (slotted or via default slot)

props.type: default | primary | success | warning | danger | info
props.description: Colour variant

props.name: size
props.description: Tag size preset

props.name: outline
props.description: Use outline (border-only) visual style

components.name: textarea-pk

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name (forwarded to inner `<textarea>`)

props.name: id
props.description: Field id; forwarded to inner `<textarea>` and removed from host

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown when field is empty

props.name: rows
props.description: Visible number of text rows

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the field

props.name: required
props.description: Marks the field as required for form validation

props.name: error
props.description: Error message; activates error visual state when set

props.name: resize
props.description: CSS resize behaviour

props.name: maxlength
props.description: Maximum character count; enables the hint badge when set

components.name: toggle-pk

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name forwarded to the inner `<input type="checkbox">`

props.name: checked

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the toggle

props.name: size

props.description: Form field name forwarded to the inner input

components.name: dropdown-pk

props.name: label
props.description: Default trigger button label when no `trigger` slot is provided

props.name: open
props.description: Controls the open/closed state of the dropdown menu

props.name: align
props.description: Menu alignment relative to the trigger

props.description: Disables the trigger button and prevents opening

components.name: form-field-pk

props.name: label
props.description: Visible label text above the input

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name forwarded to the slotted control

props.name: required
props.description: Marks the field as required and appends a visual indicator

props.name: error
props.description: Error message shown below the field; also sets aria-invalid on the wrapper

props.name: hint
props.description: Helper text shown below the label

slots.name: default
slots.description: The form control (`<input-pk>`, `<textarea-pk>`, `<select>`, etc.)

components.name: grid-pk

props.name: display
props.description: Grid display mode

props.name: cols
props.description: Number of columns (or 'auto' for responsive)

props.name: gap
props.description: Gap between grid items

props.name: minItemWidth
props.description: Minimum width for auto-fit columns

props.name: containerQueries
props.description: Enable container queries for responsive behavior

slots.name: default
slots.description: Grid items (direct children are grid items)

components.name: list-item-pk

props.name: primary
props.description: Primary text line of the list item

props.name: secondary
props.description: Secondary/supporting text line below the primary text

props.name: href
props.description: Makes the item a link when set

props.name: active
props.description: Highlights the item as the currently selected entry

props.name: disabled
props.description: Greys out the item and disables interaction

props.name: divider
props.description: Adds a bottom border separator after the item

slots.name: leading
slots.description: Leading content (icon, avatar, checkbox) placed before the text

slots.name: trailing
slots.description: Trailing content (badge, toggle, chevron) placed after the text

components.name: story-ring-pk

props.name: label
props.description: Name label displayed below the story ring avatar

props.name: seen
props.description: Shows the ring in a muted/seen colour state

props.name: add
props.description: Renders a "+" add-story variant with a blue indicator

slots.name: default
slots.description: Avatar image or custom thumbnail inside the ring

slots.name: add-icon
slots.description: Icon for the add-story button (defaults to `+`)

components.example:
+
Add Story

components.name: tabs-pk

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style of the tab strip

props.name: active
props.description: id of the panel to show on init (defaults to first panel)

slots.name: tabs
slots.description: `<button data-panel="id">Label</button>` triggers; one per tab

slots.name: panels
slots.description:
`
Content
` panels; id must match button data-panel

components.name: thumbnail-grid-pk

props.name: columns
props.description: Number of columns in the CSS grid

props.name: gap
props.description: Gap size between grid cells

props.name: masonry
props.description: Enables CSS masonry-style layout (column-count fallback)

slots.name: default
slots.description: Thumbnail items to display in the grid (use `` or `` elements)

components.name: topbar-pk

props.name: elevated
props.description: Adds a bottom shadow to the topbar

props.name: transparent
props.description: Removes the background colour for overlay usage

props.name: sticky
props.description: Pins the topbar to the top of the viewport

slots.name: leading
slots.description: Left-side content (back button, hamburger menu, logo)

slots.name: title
slots.description: Centre title or search bar

slots.name: actions
slots.description: Right-side icon buttons (notifications, avatar, settings)
